subject: FW: Thanks; next wk; attachments
body:
From: Tramo, Mark Jude [mailto:mark_tramo@hms.harvard.edu] 
Sent: Saturday, November 03, 2007 12:57 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Thanks; next wk; attachments

 

Thanks so much, Dr Lesley, for being on weekend call duty and resolving
my uncertainty I'd copied down the wrong number!

Jeffrey called this morning and we spoke at length...he wants to talk
agin next week...please let me know when a good time for me to call
might be, or whether the proper etiquette is that he will call me...

Monday I should be free most of the day after my mtg w/ Siemens Sr VP at
Citicorp tower - ending around 9:30A - and before my 4:30P mtg w/
physicist Brian Greene (re: developing new NYC World's Science Fair) -
Tues I'm driving back to Harvard early and will be available any time
between 7A and 11A, when my class starts -
Wed is a writing day so my schedule is wide open.

I'm attaching for JE the Siemens and Disney proposals I'm mtg w/ the
Siemens VP about  - they are relevant to our phone conversations...also
the March of Dimes proposal re: premies...

JE said he's planning on coming to Harvard Fri 11/16 - my schedule is
wide open that day/night (and now blocked pending further details).

Many thanks, again, all the way 'round,
Mark
mtramo@hms.harvard.edu
781-718-6390

P.S.
Wish me luck re Cadence's audition at American Girl Monday!  Candy and I
are starting to think these casting calls for their movies and plays are
something of a gimmick, though we're not sure why, since they can't seem
to fit more girls (and their parents) into that store already.  Where's
the American Boy store for Ty, anyway?


-----Original Message-----
From:   Lesley Groff [mailto:lesley@nysgllc.com]
Sent:   Sat 11/3/2007 10:59 AM
To:     Tramo, Mark Jude
Cc:    
Subject:        RE: JE asked me to continue our phonecall at 8P but...

Hi mark...well you did the right thing by faxing over your number...I
beleive that number may be a fax/phone line or something.  I'll let
Jeffrey know you tried.!






Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein



________________________________

From: Tramo, Mark Jude [mailto:mark_tramo@hms.harvard.edu]
Sent: Friday, November 02, 2007 10:05 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: JE asked me to continue our phonecall at 8P but...
Importance: High



Hi Lesley -

Thanks for your email...apologies for the weekend correspondence -

Talked to Jeffrey from around 2:30-3P...he asked me to call him at 8P at
# 340-775-8110...I called at 8 sharp but got what sounded like a fax
machine...after a couple more failed attempts over ensuing 10 min, my
asst successfully faxed a note w/ my cell # and email to Jeffrey at that
number...

Is that the right number?

Please advise.

Thanks, as always,
Mark
mtramo@hms.harvard.edu
cell# 781-718-6390




-----Original Message-----
From:   Lesley Groff [mailto:lesley@nysgllc.com]
Sent:   Fri 11/2/2007 3:07 PM
To:     Tramo, Mark Jude
Cc:   
Subject:        RE: submerged in CSH think tank - will call at break
between 11A and 11:30A

Hi mark...I'm actually not in the office today...but I can see that you
have touched base with the office...enjoy yourself!






Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein



________________________________

From: Tramo, Mark Jude [mailto:mark_tramo@hms.harvard.edu]
Sent: Friday, November 02, 2007 10:34 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: submerged in CSH think tank - will call at break between 11A
and 11:30A
Importance: High



thanks for the call - sorry i can't break away until 11:30A +/- 15 mins
- OK?

A m monitoring my email and cellphone intake at 20,000 leagues under the
sea...

apologies and thanks to JE

M

Thanks so much, Dr Lesley, for being on weekend call duty and resolving my uncertainty I'd copied down the wrong number!

Jeffrey called this morning and we spoke at length...he wants to talk agin next week...please let me know when a good time for me to call might be, or whether the proper etiquette is that he will call me...

Tues I'm driving back to Harvard early and will be available any time between 7A and 11A, when my class starts -

I'm attaching for JE the Siemens and Disney proposals I'm mtg w/ the Siemens VP about  - they are relevant to our phone conversations...also the March of Dimes proposal re: premies...

JE said he's planning on coming to Harvard Fri 11/16 - my schedule is wide open that day/night (and now blocked pending further details).
